arts.ttl: Arsenal dealt ‘significant’ injury blow ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta thinks that Jorginho has sustained a “significant” injury days out from their trip to Real Madrid in the Uefa Champions League. The Gunners were held to a 1-1 draw by Brentford at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday after Thomas Partey’s 61st-minute opener was cancelled out by Yoane Wissa.
